description: Please login to access your account.
deleteAccountConfirmation:
Are you sure you want to delete your account? 
This action cannot be undone. 
All your data will be permanently removed. 
Please confirm that you want to proceed with deleting your account.
changePasswordDescription:
Change the password associated with your account. 
Make sure you choose a strong and secure password to protect your account.
personalInfoDescription: Edit your personal information and account details.
accountEmailDescription: Change your email address associated with your account.
dangerZoneDescription:
These actions are irreversible. 
Proceed with caution.
dangerZoneConfirmation: Deleting your account is permanent and results in the loss of all your data.
